Character_Classes.GameCharacter

Description
Character_Classes
 

  • Uses of GameCharacter in Character_Classes

    Subclasses of GameCharacter in Character_Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    EnemyChar
    Represents a hostile NPC entity within the dungeon grid.
    class 
    NPChar
    Represents a non-playable character (NPC) in the game world.
    class 
    PlayableChar
    Represents a user-controlled character within the game.
    Methods in Character_Classes with parameters of type GameCharacter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    GameCharacter.dealDmg(GameCharacter enemy)
    Deals damage to a target enemy based on this character's attack power.
    void
    PlayableChar.takeDmg(GameCharacter entity)
    Overrides standard damage reception to apply defensive subtraction and logging tracking enemy names if the strike results in a character defeat.
